raw_consumer_statement: Citibank determined a fraudulent credit card charge as valid and closed investigation in XX/XX/XXXX. I was notified through hardcopy letter dated XX/XX/XXXX. In the investigation, the merchant provided purchaser email that uses my name, but is NOT my email address ; I have never created or used that email address. Purchaser provided my actual home address, but the product ( 3 tickets, total transaction {$340.00} ) were delivered via email. The tickets were bought from XXXX XXXX  App and processed by XXXX XXXX XXXXXXXX MA, but I have never bought anything from XXXX. I didn't get any notifications during or after the purchase on XX/XX/XXXX, and only found out and filed a dispute 3 days later when I looked at my credit card transactions on XX/XX/XXXX.
